description_long: This is a black PlayStation-style game controller, featuring a symmetrical design with two analog sticks, a directional pad, and four iconic face buttons marked with colored symbols (triangle, circle, cross, and square). The controller has ergonomic hand grips for comfortable holding, and shoulder buttons are visible on the top edge. The central area includes a PlayStation logo button and a rectangular touchpad or light bar. The surface is mostly matte black plastic with some glossy highlights, and the buttons are made of colored plastic. The controller is compact and lightweight, designed for handheld use during gaming sessions. It is a common accessory for video game consoles and can be found in urban homes, gaming cafes, or entertainment centers.
description: A black PlayStation-style game controller with dual analog sticks, colored face buttons, and ergonomic hand grips. It features a central logo button, shoulder buttons, and a sleek, matte plastic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the analog sticks, directional pad, face buttons, and central PlayStation logo button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right grip, face buttons, and the curvature of the controller.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the shoulder buttons, triggers, and the light bar or touchpad area.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the left, showing the left grip, analog sticks, and part of the directional pad.
